_comment: Each logical field lists every header spelling CMS has used across recent CLFS quarterly files. The parser matches case-insensitively and ignores spaces/underscores. If a future CMS file uses a header not listed here, add it to the matching list below instead of touching any code.

_fallback_positional_map._comment: Used ONLY if a file has no header row at all. Fill these in with 0-based column indexes after inspecting one real downloaded file with --inspect. Leave -1 for fields that don't apply.
